Our story

Born in a Melbourne sauna.

Socialyte started with a lightbulb moment in a sauna.

The idea came from a simple moment after a sauna session in Melbourne, heading straight into a social engagement and not wanting to carry around a big water bottle with electrolytes mixed in.

It raised a simple question: why wasn't there a ready-to-drink electrolyte drink made for moments like this?

Something functional, refreshing and easy to enjoy. Something that could support hydration after a workout, before a night out, during a long day, or anywhere in between. Something that felt just as at home in a gym bag as it did at a bar, by the pool, at a festival or on a flight.

The options felt limited. Electrolytes were mostly treated as clinical or sporty, while social drinks were often sugary, alcoholic, or just uninspiring sparkling water.

So I created the drink I was looking for.

Socialyte is hydration reimagined - a lightly sparkling, zero sugar electrolyte drink designed for real life and the moments that hold it together.

Built around the idea of hydration for every occasion, Socialyte brings together wellness and social culture in a way that feels modern, easy and relevant. For people who want to feel good, perform well and recover better - whether they're drinking, not drinking, or somewhere in between.

NoaFounder, Socialyte · Melbourne
